text.title: Senior Promotion Case Template (Outsource Shop) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf names either a concrete rule id or `skip-this-methodology` when the case is out of scope. Max depth = 2.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this an up-or-stay senior-track promotion in an outsource shop?

branch.when: ladder_type == outsource_senior_track AND tenure_months >= 18 AND engagements >= 2

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: this case is out of scope for this methodology
skip-this-methodology: this case is out of scope for this methodology

text.example: Observable: ladder_type == outsource_senior_track AND tenure_months >= 18 AND engagements >= 2 → conclusion: r1-tri-axis-coverage.
